hooks.command: cmd="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'deploy|publish|release|push.*prod|kubectl.*apply|terraform.*apply'; then echo '⚠️  DEPLOY SAFETY CHECK: You are about to run a deployment/publish command. Have you:'; echo '  1. Run all tests?'; echo '  2. Verified in staging?'; echo '  3. Defined a rollback plan?'; echo '  4. Informed stakeholders?'; echo ''; echo 'If unsure, cancel and run /deploy first.'; fi
